events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes duct installation at rough-complete stage with sagging flex duct exceeding ½ inch per foot between supports. This is a defect/non-compliance issue per SMACNA and IMC 603. The work is roughly 70% complete until defects corrected. Since it's non-compliant, decision should be fail.
